meaning: n.肥料(尤指化学肥料),[动]受精媒介物
examples: A top dressing of fertilizer should be added to improve growth as mint impoverishes the soil quickly.
The tractor hauled the fertilizer away.
It's fertilizer, so it has a lot of nutrients.
But they are also used in the production of fertilizer, garden mulch, and soil conditioner.
The ground has to be tilled, the seeds sown, fertilizer spread, the ground watered.
